steps.name: log_in_veeva

rag_context_used: Click the Log In button.
Click Log In.
Click Log In button.
Click Log Out.
Click Log Out from the dropdown list.

steps.name: navigate_to_the_automation_platform_vaul_veeva
steps.original_output: Click on the 'Navigate to the Automation: Platform Vault' link.
steps.enhanced_output: Click Navigate to the Automation: Platform Vault button.
steps.label: Navigate to the Automation: Platform Vault
rag_context_used: Navigate to Admin > Users & Groups > Vault Users.
Click jumplink to navigate to section.
Navigate to Business Admin > Objects > Users.
Navigate to '<<vault_url>>'.
Click on Objects tab.

steps.label: User Profile
rag_context_used: Click the User Profile button.
Click on the User Profile Icon.
Click User Profile Button in the top right corner.
Verify that '<<username>>' is logged into the vault.
Verify that the '<<submission_cooridinator>>' user is logged in successfully.

steps.name: take_screenshot_of_the_page_veeva
steps.label: Screenshot

steps.label: Tab Collection

Select <<tabCollection>> from Preferred Tab Collection dropdown.
Click Tab Collections.
Click the Tab Collections button.
Click on Business Admin from the tab collection.

steps.enhanced_output: Select 'Admin' from the Business Admin dropdown list.
steps.label: Admin
rag_context_used: Click on Admin.
Click on the Admin tab in the navigation bar.
Select Admin from the Tab Collections dropdown.
Select Clinical Admin from Tab Collections.
Select Quality Admin from Tab Collections.

steps.name: configuration_veeva
steps.label: Configuration
rag_context_used: Click on the Select a Vault input.
Click on Admin.
Click the Continue button.
Click the Log In button.
Click the Create button.

steps.label: Objects
rag_context_used: Click the Objects tab.
Click on Objects tab.
Navigate to Business Admin > Objects > Users.
Type '<<object_name>>' in the Search Objects Input Field.
Search for 'Departments' in the Objects search bar.

steps.label: Product_200 Checklist
rag_context_used: Click on the Select a Vault input.
Click on Admin.
Click the Continue button.
Click the Log In button.

steps.label: Fields
rag_context_used: Click Fields section.
Enter required values in Title, Description, Justification, Category, Rating, Owning Facility, and Owning Department fields.
Enter address details in the Address fields.
Click on the Select a Vault input.
Click on Admin.

steps.label: Screenshot
rag_context_used: Capture a screenshot of the current page.

steps.label: Create
rag_context_used: Click the Create button.
Click the global Create button.
Click the +Create button.
Click Create and select Binder.

steps.name: email_veeva
steps.original_output: Select 'Email' from the Field Type dropdown list.
steps.enhanced_output: Select 'Email' from the Field Type dropdown list.
steps.label: Email
rag_context_used: Enter <<email>> in the Email field.
Enter '<<email>>' in the Email field.
Select '<<vault_name>>' from the vault dropdown list.
Select '<<quality_vault_name>>' from the Vault dropdown.
Select a value from the Applicant dropdown.

steps.name: field_type_veeva
steps.original_output: Enter 'Suraj' in the Field Type field.
steps.enhanced_output: Enter {value} in Field Type Input Field.

rag_context_used: Type '<<vault_name>>' in the Search Vaults Input Field.
Enter '<<text>>' in the Description Input Field.
Type '<<object_name>>' in the Search Objects Input Field.
Enter '<<password>>' in the Password Input Field.
Enter '<<username>>' in the User Name field.

steps.name: cancel_veeva
steps.label: Cancel
rag_context_used: Click Cancel.
Click Cancel to discard changes.
Click No to cancel.
Click Close to close the dialog.
Click on the Select a Vault input.

steps.label: Continue
rag_context_used: Click Continue.
Click Continue button.
Click the Continue button.

steps.name: take_screenshot_of_the_page_veeva
steps.label: Screenshot

full_script:
PTS 1:
1. Proceed to PTS 1.
2. Click Log In button.
3. Click Navigate to the Automation: Platform Vault button.
4. Click User Profile button.
5. Take screenshot of the page.
6. Click Tab Collection button.
7. Select 'Admin' from the Business Admin dropdown list.
8. Click Configuration button.
9. Click Objects button.
10. Click Product_200 Checklist button.
11. Click Fields button.
12. Take screenshot of the page.
13. Click Create button.
14. Select 'Email' from the Field Type dropdown list.
15. Enter {value} in Field Type Input Field.
16. Click Cancel button.
17. Click Continue button.
18. Take screenshot of the page.
